title: Greeks should use their spare time Google Earthing Greece

enrichment.summary: Kyle suggests that unemployed Greeks use their free time to collaboratively build a detailed Google Earth overlay of Ancient Greece, including tribes, cities, populations, trade routes, and battles. He expresses frustration that this hasn't been done yet and says he's started some of it himself.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Should use it productively to map Ancient Greece on Google Earth

stances.topic: existing Google Earth Ancient Greece content
Greek collective action on this project
stances.position: Frustrated that Greeks haven't done it; embarrassing that outsiders might do it instead

claims.subject: unemployed Greeks
claims.claim: Unemployed Greeks are moving back in with their parents and have a lot of spare time.

claims.subject: Google Earth
claims.claim: Nobody has really created a detailed map of Ancient Greece on Google Earth.

claims.subject: Google Earth
claims.claim: The only thing available on Google Earth related to Ancient Greece is some drawings and vague representations.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have created a bunch of tribes, cities, and other details across Europe and Italy for Google Earth.

claims.subject: Ancient Greece project
claims.claim: Completing the Ancient Greece project on Google Earth would require a lot of work, including adding cities, databases, populations, and battles.

claims.subject: Ancient Greece project
claims.claim: The whole country of Greece could organically collaborate to build the Ancient Greece project on Google Earth without needing coordination.

claims.subject: Ancient Greece project
claims.claim: People can check Google Earth to see what hasn't been done yet and contribute by uploading their additions immediately.

claims.subject: Ancient Greece project
claims.claim: The project would grow organically because it's fun and interesting, especially with historical details.

claims.subject: Greeks
claims.claim: Greeks should take the initiative to create detailed historical content about Greece on Google Earth instead of waiting for others to do it.

claims.subject: Americans
claims.claim: Americans might end up creating all the free trade routes and historical voyages related to Greece on Google Earth if Greeks don't act.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will share a link to my Google Earth project below and update it today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If anyone contributes to the Ancient Greece project on Google Earth, I want to know about new additions I haven't included yet.
